response.justification: Strong geospatial and distributed systems foundation with demonstrated software craftsmanship, but the resume shows no modern C++ experience—the primary requirement. Last C++ work was 2014-2015 at National Instruments; recent focus is TypeScript/Node.js. Would require significant ramp-up on the core technology stack despite domain alignment.
strengths: Direct geospatial data platform expertise as founder of GISCollective and contributor to Green Map GIS applications
Proven distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby building high-performance, low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second
Strong emphasis on software quality through TDD, CI/CD practices, and creation of testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No modern C++ development experience; last C++ work was 2014-2015 at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
No Rust background or low-level systems programming (D language is closest, but not a direct substitute)
Geospatial experience focuses on data collection and management platforms, not routing/navigation guidance systems

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and backend performance experience
